MODULE: cosmos.integration.visual_debugging
FILE: cosmos/integration/visual_debugging.py (115 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Visual Debugging - Screenshot & Diagram Analysis.

"Let me look at that with my special eyes!"

This module implements:
1. UI Element Recognition (Buttons, Inputs, Errors)
2. Diagram Understanding (Architecture flows)
3. Visual Debugging (Correlating visual errors with logs)

CLASSES:
- UIElement
- DiagramNode
- VisualAnalysisResult
- VisualDebugger: Expert system for visual debugging.
Integrates OCR, Object Detection (simulated 
  Methods: async def analyze_screenshot(self, image_source: Any) -> VisualAnalysisResult
  Methods: async def parse_diagram(self, image_source: Any) -> VisualAnalysisResult

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_visual_debugger(device='auto')
